intentSynonyms: look up a product in instacart
fetch a single product in instacart
view one specific product in instacart
get product details by item id in instacart
description: Get detailed information about a product by its item ID. The item ID format is "items_{shopId}-{productId}" (e.g. "items_121560-7079"). Requires a shop ID for pricing context.

item_ids.description: Item IDs to look up (format: items_{shopId}-{productId})
